name: Desert Mercenary corps
short_description: Welcome to Desert Mercenaries, a role-playing adventure game set in the desert. In the vast and barren Monchi Desert, you will form your own team and explore the unknown desert mysteries. Let your team win the respect and recognition of the entire Monchi Desert.
detailed_description:
[Desert Mercenary corps] is an open-world sandbox adventure role-playing game. Players can recruit various types of partners in the game to build their own strongest mercenary group.


In the Monchi Desert, players will experience the entire construction process of the mercenary group, from recruitment, training to command operations, players need to carefully plan.


In addition to building and managing mercenary groups, players can also explore a variety of scenes, fight fiercely with various monsters in mysterious caves, and reveal the secrets hidden in them. Unlocking the mysterious tomb is also an important task, requiring players to use wisdom and skills to solve puzzles.


As a group leader, it is also crucial to meet the needs of partners. They may have various expectations and needs. While ensuring their comfortable lives, they also need to consider how to improve their combat effectiveness.


Traveling in the desert maze is an even more arduous task. The maze is intricate and full of dangers, and it is easy to get lost here. Therefore, it is necessary to find an oasis in this vast land.



In addition, it is also very important to arrange the positions of the players and choose the right equipment when setting up the formation. Only through a reasonable layout can you win a refreshing victory!

supported_languages: English, Simplified Chinese, Traditional Chinese, Japanese, Korean, Russian
